entities.name: Stage of relationship
entities.context: Framework for evaluating relationship context - distinguishes cold outreach from ongoing relationships with mutual context

entities.name: Energy at close
entities.context: Signal for measuring conversation outcome quality - positive indicators include collaborative language and shared momentum

entities.name: practical experiment
entities.context: Preferred approach in business relationships - concrete next steps over abstract promises

relationships.context: Positive closing energy correlates with alignment on practical experiments rather than abstract commitments
Both are contextual signals V uses to analyze relationship dynamics and conversation outcomes
